task_completion.description: A Bill of Materials is configured for the 'Ergo-Flex Desk' product template.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Odoo Bill of Materials configuration screen where the 'Product' or 'Product Template' field is set to 'Ergo-Flex Desk'.

task_completion.description: Universal components are added to the BoM without variant restrictions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the BoM 'Components' tab, 'Desk Frame (Universal)' and 'Assembly Hardware Kit' are listed. The 'Apply on Variants' column for these two items must be empty.

task_completion.description: Edition-specific components are added with correct variant restrictions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the BoM 'Components' tab, 'Standard Motor Unit' has 'Edition: Standard' in the 'Apply on Variants' column. 'Pro Heavy-Duty Motor Unit' and 'Cable Management Tray' both have 'Edition: Pro' in the 'Apply on Variants' column.

task_completion.description: Finish-specific components are added with correct variant restrictions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the BoM 'Components' tab, 'Oak Desktop Board' has 'Finish: Oak' in the 'Apply on Variants' column. 'White Desktop Board' has 'Finish: White' in the 'Apply on Variants' column.

task_completion.description: A Manufacturing Order is created for the 'Ergo-Flex Desk (Pro, White)' variant.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Manufacturing Order screen where the 'Product' field is explicitly set to 'Ergo-Flex Desk (Pro, White)' or shows the variant attributes (Pro, White).

task_completion.description: The Manufacturing Order reserves the correct components based on the variant logic.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Components' tab of the Manufacturing Order for the (Pro, White) variant, exactly these 5 components should be listed: 'Desk Frame (Universal)', 'Assembly Hardware Kit', 'Pro Heavy-Duty Motor Unit', 'Cable Management Tray', and 'White Desktop Board'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo web GUI to configure the BoM and MO.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Odoo web interface (menus, form views, list views) rather than terminal windows, API scripts, or database queries.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should display standard Odoo elements like breadcrumbs (e.g., Manufacturing / Bills of Materials), standard buttons (Save, Edit, Confirm), and status bars.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected output into a text editor or mock the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Manufacturing Order should have a standard system-generated reference number (e.g., WH/MO/00001) and the components list should be in a standard Odoo data table, not a plain text document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring a BoM in Odoo for 'Ergo-Flex Desk' with variant-specific components. Universal components (no variant restrictions): 'Desk Frame (Universal)', 'Assembly Hardware Kit'. Edition-specific: 'Standard Motor Unit' (Edition: Standard), 'Pro Heavy-Duty Motor Unit' (Edition: Pro), 'Cable Management Tray' (Edition: Pro). Finish-specific: 'Oak Desktop Board' (Finish: Oak), 'White Desktop Board' (Finish: White). The final test is a Manufacturing Order for 'Ergo-Flex Desk (Pro, White)', which must include exactly 5 components: Desk Frame (Universal), Assembly Hardware Kit, Pro Heavy-Duty Motor Unit, Cable Management Tray, and White Desktop Board.
